title: Closing Actions
heading: Conclusion and actions
finalText: Close the deck with a concise conclusion and clear actions.

actions.title: Prioritize
actions.description: Define priorities and the focus for the next 30 days.

actions.title: Validate
actions.description: Check risks, assumptions, and critical dependencies.

actions.title: Decide
actions.description: Clarify what needs confirmation or authorization.

decisionAsk: Confirm resources, priorities, and authorization for the next phase.
summary: A closing slide should make next steps explicit, not just repeat a slogan.
